description: Run an opinionated multi-step install profile (minimal, base, git-compact, advance, cpp-dx, small-dev).

messages.profileNotFound: Profile '{name}' is not defined in config.json. Run '.\run.ps1 profile list' to see available profiles.
messages.configParseFailed: Failed to parse profile config at {path}: {error}
messages.cycleDetected: Cycle detected in profile expansion: {chain}. Aborting (CODE RED).
messages.summaryTotalsFail: {failed} of {total} step(s) failed (in {elapsed}s). See details above.
messages.missingScript: Script id={id} not found in registry. Cannot run step {n}: {label}
messages.missingChoco: Chocolatey is not installed. Cannot run choco step: '{package}'. Install choco first or run 'profile minimal' which installs it.
messages.inlineMissing: Inline function '{function}' is not defined in scripts/profile/helpers/inline.ps1.

help.header: Profile -- run an opinionated multi-step install pipeline
